policy.description: Hold out retrieve tools for final OOD; within the remaining retrieve tools, hold out three benign contexts for calibration.
policy.calibration_strategy: context-held-out Cartesian slice across every in-domain retrieve tool
policy.goal_ids_hash_encoding: sha256(UTF-8 goal_ids joined by LF in manifest order, no trailing LF)
invariants: train and calibration goal IDs are disjoint
train and calibration share in-domain retrieve tools but use disjoint benign contexts
final_ood retrieve tools are disjoint from train and calibration retrieve tools
all 153 final_ood goals are reserved for final evaluation and excluded from calibration

calibration.role: defense selection, Gate 1, and in-domain learning checks only

final_ood.role: untouched held-out retrieve-tool final evaluation only
